scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix ai-gateway && npm install --prefix antilogin-gateway && npm install --prefix upload-ai-gateway && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
